sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports anxiety and stress, particularly related to recent travel and visitors. He reports excessive sugar intake in the weeks leading up to his presentation. He denies chest pain, shortness of breath, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, fever, or chills. He reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has trace pitting edema to his lower extremities. Lung sounds are clear bilaterally. Heart sounds are regular. Blood pressure is mildly low. Glucose is 162 mg/dL. Hemoglobin A1c is 8%.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has newly diagnosed diabetes and anxiety. He has a history of epilepsy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a hemoglobin A1c test. Continue metformin 500 mg twice a day. Follow up as needed. Schedule a neurology follow-up in 3 months. Recommend strategies for managing anxiety.
